content.problemStatement: Given a string S and an integer, K. Write a program to print characters with frequency greater than or equal to K in sorted order.
constraints:
- $2 \leq length(S) \leq 10^5$
- $1 \leq K \leq 10^5$
- S can have both upper and lowercase letters
content.inputFormat:
- The first line contains two integers: $N$ and $K$.
- The second line contains the string $S$.
content.outputFormat: Output the characters with frequency greater than or equal to $K$.
